CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is timely filed and unopposed. Motion is granted, including costs and fees as requested.

Order signed. Consent judgment signed.

Judge: Barbara A. Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)
